@graph.name: M.S. Renovation
@graph.description: Professional painter, decorator, and home improvement contractor in Aberdeen, Scotland. Trusted Trader certified with a 5-star rating.

mainEntity.name: How much does painting and decorating cost in Aberdeen?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary depending on the size and scope of the work. We will give you a clear, honest quote after discussing your project, with no charge for the quote itself.
Yes, every quote is free and no-obligation. Contact us via WhatsApp, phone, or the contact form and we will get back to you.
Yes. We are a member of the Aberdeen Trusted Trader scheme, supported by Police Scotland and Aberdeen City Council, with a 5.0 star rating from 16 reviews.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle small repair jobs?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Property repair and general maintenance is one of our core services, so we take on small repair jobs alongside larger projects.

mainEntity.name: Do you work on full home renovation projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Alongside painting and decorating, we offer plastering, carpentry, bathroom refurbishment, and property repair, so we can take on a full renovation rather than just a single room.

mainEntity.name: What areas around Aberdeen do you cover?

acceptedAnswer.text: We serve Aberdeen and Aberdeenshire. Get in touch and we will let you know if your project is in range.

mainEntity.name: How long will my project take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Timelines depend on the size and scope of the work. We will give you a realistic timeframe as part of your quote.
Fill out the contact form, or message us directly on WhatsApp or by phone on 07572 916190. We will talk through your project and arrange a free quote.
